description: The Float4Driver component can be used to drive a foat4 value, based on an X, Y, Z and a W value.

fields.X: The field that holds the X value for the float4. If null, the X component of the float4 will be 0.
fields.Y: The field that holds the Y value for the float4. If null, the Y component of the float4 will be 0.
fields.Z: The field that holds the Z value for the float4. If null, the Z component of the float4 will be 0.
fields.W: The field that holds the W value for the float4. If null, the W component of the float4 will be 0.
fields.Target: The field that is driven to the constructed float4.
